title: Small-time local stabilization of the two dimensional incompressible Navier-Stokes equations
abstract: We provide explicit time-varying feedback laws that locally stabilize the two dimensional internal controlled incompressible Navier-Stokes equations in arbitrarily small time. We also obtain quantitative rapid stabilization via stationary feedback laws, as well as quantitative null controllability with explicit controls having $e^{C/T}$ costs.
